vocab.meaning: những năm tháng hình thành nhân cách (tuổi thơ)
vocab.example: During my formative years, I spent nearly every afternoon exploring the local park on foot.

vocab.meaning: hòa mình/gần gũi với thiên nhiên
vocab.example: Walking allowed me to commune with nature, even at a young age, by observing the changing seasons.

vocab.meaning: thực hiện những chuyến tham quan/dã ngoại ngắn
vocab.example: My friends and I would often embark on mini excursions to the edge of town just to see the sunset.

vocab.meaning: khắc sâu vào tâm trí/ký ức
vocab.example: The sights and smells of those childhood walks are permanently imprinted on my memory.
Every Sunday, my grandfather would take me for a leisurely stroll through the botanical gardens.

vocab.meaning: bị gò bó trong bốn bức tường (ở trong nhà quá nhiều)
vocab.example: Unlike kids today, I hated being bound by four walls and always sought an excuse to go outside.

vocab.meaning: vùng đất chưa được khám phá/xa lạ
vocab.example: To a seven-year-old, the woods behind our house felt like vast, uncharted territory.

vocab.meaning: một ký ức sống động về việc gì
vocab.example: I have a vivid recollection of walking to the candy store every Saturday morning with my pocket money.
Having a walk was the best way to unwind after school and clear my head before doing homework.

vocab.meaning: tình cờ bắt gặp/phát hiện ra
vocab.example: We used to stumble upon hidden ponds and secret gardens during our long walks across the countryside.
